cms.task_text: Hexagon s přerušenými stranami se neuzavírá — [hlp]chybí right(60)[/hlp] po každé straně. Přidejte otočení.
cms.start_blocks_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="controls_repeat_ext" x="50" y="50"><value name="TIMES"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">6</field></shadow></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_pen_down"><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">30</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_up"><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">10</field></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></statement></block></xml>
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="controls_repeat_ext" x="50" y="50"><value name="TIMES"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">6</field></shadow></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_pen_down"><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">30</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_up"><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">10</field><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">60</field></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></statement></block></xml>
